name: Lucky Break
title: Lucky Break
flavor: It shouldn't have worked. It did.
text: Discard one held Misery. Discard this.

name: Clear Head
title: Clear Head
flavor: For a moment everything is obvious.
text: Discard one held Misery. Discard this.

name: Good Timing
title: Good Timing
flavor: You arrive at exactly the right moment.
text: Reduce next event cost by 2, minimum 0. Discard.

name: Second Wind
title: Second Wind
flavor: You didn't know you had it in you.
text: Reduce next event cost by 2, minimum 0. Discard.

name: Premonition
title: Premonition
flavor: Something tells you to slow down.
text: Look ahead: see next Road card without resolving. To skip it: discard 1 additional Luck. Discard this after use.

name: Familiar Ground
title: Familiar Ground
flavor: You've been here before. In a dream maybe.
text: Look ahead: see next Road card without resolving. To skip it: discard 1 additional Luck. Discard this after use.

name: Found Strength
title: Found Strength
flavor: You rest for a moment. Just a moment.

name: Small Mercy
title: Small Mercy
flavor: The road gives you something back.

name: Let It Go
title: Let It Go
flavor: You put it down. You feel better.
text: Discard one held Misery and restore 1 Drive. If holding no Misery: restore 1 Drive only. Discard this.
